posts.author: CraftyKnitter92
posts.text: Just finished my latest cardigan! It took about 3 weeks to complete, but I'm really happy with the texture. Perfect for coming winter in Westbridge. #knitting #cardigan
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby and creative achievement with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.
